capabilities.verified_merchant_discovery: quote_tournament returns opt-in registry-backed merchant candidates.
capabilities.catalog_or_quote_fetch: create_quote returns final item, tax, shipping, stock, expiry, and payment requirements.
capabilities.quote_comparison: quote_tournament ranks candidates by final quote and delivery data.
capabilities.approval_record: create_approval creates a portable approval request and approval hash.
capabilities.checkout_handoff: resume_checkout or checkout binds approval, quote, idempotency, and payment receipt.
capabilities.aftercare_state: order_status returns structured delivery, cancellation, refund, and aftercare state.
capabilities.audit_export_or_import: audit exports the service purchase trail.
capabilities.safety_constraints: The skill requires explicit approval and uses AgentCart service policy before checkout.

capabilities.verified_merchant_discovery: doctor and resolve_merchant verify configured registry records before merchant calls.
capabilities.catalog_or_quote_fetch: quote and discover_quotes fetch final ShopBridge quotes.
capabilities.quote_comparison: discover_quotes and discover_basket_quotes rank verified merchants.
capabilities.approval_record: approval_packet creates a portable approval record hash for chat-local approval.
capabilities.checkout_handoff: payment_handoff produces a quote-bound payment request before checkout.
capabilities.aftercare_state: order_status and aftercare_summary use structured merchant status.
capabilities.audit_export_or_import: checkout can return an audit packet for later AgentCart service import.
capabilities.safety_constraints: The skill rejects underspecified payment receipts and non-verified registry records.

capabilities.catalog_or_quote_fetch: agentcart.search_catalog and agentcart.create_quote provide catalog and final quote access.
capabilities.quote_comparison: agentcart.discover_merchants exposes quote-tournament candidates for client ranking or selection.
capabilities.approval_record: agentcart.create_approval and agentcart.record_approval_decision separate proposal from human decision.
capabilities.checkout_handoff: agentcart.checkout requires quote id, approval id, idempotency key, and quote-bound payment receipt.
capabilities.aftercare_state: agentcart.get_order returns structured order and aftercare state.
capabilities.audit_export_or_import: agentcart.export_audit and agentcart.import_skill_audit cover portable audit packets.
capabilities.safety_constraints: Tool annotations require verified discovery, explicit approval, idempotency, and quote-bound payment receipts.
